title: Walkthrough
description: Schema for a curated game walkthrough checklist.

game.description: Full game title, e.g. 'Dark Souls Remastered'

title.description: Walkthrough title, e.g. 'Complete Walkthrough' or 'All Achievements'

author.description: Author or site name of the original walkthrough

attribution.description: Attribution text shown at the bottom of every page. Must credit the original source.

cover_image.description: Optional: URL to a cover image for the game

hltb.description: Optional: HowLongToBeat time estimates for this game in hours

main_story.description: Hours to finish the main story (HowLongToBeat 'Main Story')

content.description: Full walkthrough prose in Markdown. Embed milestone checkpoints with <!-- checkpoint: <id> | <label> --> markers.

checkpoints.description: Milestone checkpoints referenced in the content field. Each checkpoint id must appear in a <!-- checkpoint: id | label --> marker in content.

steps.description: Granular checkable action items. Optional when content is provided.

id.description: Unique checkpoint slug, used in <!-- checkpoint: id | label --> markers

label.description: Human-readable milestone label, e.g. 'Reached Firelink Shrine'

type.description: step=checkable action, note=info only, warning=important warning, collectible=missable item, boss=boss fight

note.description: Optional supplemental note shown below the step text

image_url.description: Optional screenshot or map image URL
